overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city street in Japantown. The character travels along a covered pedestrian walkway, crosses a busy intersection with holographic billboards, and continues along a waterfront promenade with elevated highways overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon signage

events.description: character briefly transitions from walking to running then back to walking

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange-tiled pedestrian path beneath the metal arch structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead on the same path

entered.detail: futuristic curved metal framework forming a covered walkway overhead with integrated lighting
large floating digital advertisements displaying animated neon content on building facades
distinctive orange-colored paved walkway surface with geometric patterns
tall futuristic towers with reflective glass surfaces and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered pedestrian walkway with distinctive orange pavement tiles. Overhead, a curved metal arch structure spans the path while holographic billboards and neon signs illuminate the glass skyscrapers lining the street. Sparse pedestrians walk in the same direction ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional zone approaching major intersection with bus stop

events.description: exiting the fully covered section of walkway into a more open area with bus stop infrastructure
approaching crosswalk and stopping at the curb to wait for traffic signal

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway past a bus stop shelter and digital advertisement displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting on bench at bus stop shelter

entered.detail: futuristic transit shelter with curved roof and integrated seating
tall vertical display showing animated advertisements with a man's face
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt ahead

segments.scene_description: The character moves past a bus stop shelter with a seated pedestrian and digital advertisement kiosks. The covered walkway structure recedes behind as the scene opens toward a major intersection. The character approaches the crosswalk and stops at the curb while vehicles pass on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection crosswalk with elevated highway ramps

events.description: traffic signal changes allowing pedestrians to cross, vehicles stop at intersection
character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street with other pedestrians
purple sports car passes through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the street with a group of pedestrians while cars pass by

notable_agents.action: purple sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass structure spanning across the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The character waits at a busy intersection crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes. After the traffic signal changes, the character crosses the multi-lane street alongside other pedestrians while a purple sports car passes through. Elevated highway ramps loom overhead against the afternoon sky.

events.description: completing street crossing and turning right onto waterfront promenade with canal visible
entering shadow cast by overhead highway structure, lighting becomes darker and more contrasted

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade with the canal on the right side, passing under the elevated highway

entered.detail: dark water channel running parallel to the walkway with reflections of surrounding structures
blue-green metal safety barrier separating the walkway from the water's edge
wet reflective concrete walkway surface along the waterfront

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character turns onto a waterfront promenade running alongside a dark canal. The path is bordered by a blue metal railing on the right and passes beneath the massive concrete pillars of the elevated highway. The lighting shifts as the character moves into the shadow of the overpass, with industrial buildings visible across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit pedestrian corridor through a bustling city intersection and onto a shadowed waterfront promenade. It begins along a covered walkway with orange pavement tiles, moving beneath curved metal arches and holographic billboards that illuminate the surrounding glass skyscrapers. As the character passes a bus stop shelter and digital kiosks, the covered structure recedes and the scene opens toward a major intersection where the character pauses at the curb. The camera then follows the character across a yellow-striped crosswalk alongside other pedestrians and a purple sports car, with elevated highway ramps looming overhead against the afternoon sky. Finally, the path turns onto a waterfront promenade bordered by a blue metal railing, shifting into the deep shadow of massive concrete overpass pillars as industrial buildings appear across a dark canal.
